# Patient Monitors Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- monitor type;
- display size;
- measured parameters;
- modules/options;
- alarms;
- connectivity;
- battery;
- accessories/sensors.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- user manual/IFU;
- datasheet;
- module/accessory compatibility list.

## Key Characteristics

- ECG leads;
- SpO2 technology;
- NIBP/IBP;
- temperature channels;
- CO2 support;
- screen size;
- battery duration;
- network/connectivity;
- alarm system.

## Compatibility Requirements

- SpO2 sensors;
- ECG cables;
- cuffs;
- modules;
- central station compatibility;
- mounts.

## Common Conflicts

- Parameters depend on installed modules.
- Accessories vary by region.
- Alarm claims may be marketing-shortened.
- Display size and battery differ by variant.

## Review Notes

Do not treat optional modules as base-device characteristics unless document states inclusion.
